feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: CATS on GDPR
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

we have an issue from the Data Protection Team regarding CATS_APPR_LITE and CATS_DA t-codes. As per their statement - if number of hours charged by users are shown to everyone then it is against GDPR. Can you please help us understand if this is really GDPR non-compliance?

Data protection team said the Line Manager can only read and approve the time for their subordinate and the Cost Object Owner can only read and approve the time which booked to their cost object.

This is not happening unless we need to program the logic in CATS. I wonder this kind of requirement why has not been a standard SAP functionality?

Thank you!
Alex 
P.S: Posted on behalf of my customer. We appreciate your support!

entry.title: WM Bin sort
entry.content:
Hi,

Want to check if there is any way to sort bin numbers created at stack level when warehouse creates in a different bin order.

Currently our bin order shows as below:

1N-00-A0
1N-00-C0
1N-00-E0
1N-08-A0
1N-08-E0
1N-08-J0
1N-08-O0
1N-100-A0
1N-100-E0
1N-14-A0
1N-14-E0

Warehouse wants to sort the above bins by stack number (Rowrow-stackstackstack-levellevel) which would be as below order:

1N-00-A0
1N-00-C0
1N-00-E0
1N-08-A0
1N-08-E0
1N-08-J0
1N-08-O0
1N-14-A0
1N-14-E0
1N-100-A0
1N-100-E0

Can the above order be achieved in LS11?

I understand it is sorting taking the whole bin field as alphanumeric characters but just wanted to confirm if there any option to get it sorted with stack 100 at the end?

TIA

entry.title: 3 way match configuration settings
entry.content: What steps/test procedures should be followed to verify whether 3 way match configuration settings have been configured appropriately?

entry.title: How to Include Specific Updates in Purchase Order Notifications in SAP S/4HANA Cloud?
entry.content: I created a situation type on the SAP S/4HANA Cloud system that sends notifications to customers when a purchase order is updated. However, my boss suggested that it would be great if customers could know which specific section or part of the purchase order has been updated in the notification. I’m not sure how to implement this, and I would appreciate any guidance.

entry.title: Dispatcher, YELLOW, Running but Message Server unreachable
entry.content:
HI Team,

while starting the SAP dispatcher is not comming up and its show the error message as 

Dispatcher, YELLOW, Running but Message Server unreachable, 

Could you please help me on this 

Thanks 

Maladri

entry.title: RE-Fx flow type involved when a contract is interrupted before the end date
entry.content:
Dear SAP team, 

we would like to be sure to have all the needed Flow type customized in our system, so I am writing to ask which is the proper one the system will trigger in case of an interruption during the life the contract life?  That means the contract"s life is stopped before its end date. In this case we expected a loss due to asset retirement so the Flow type should manage the Lease Debit versus Loss gl account. 

Thanks a lot in advance for your smart support

Regards

Donatella

entry.title: Partner Determination for Item proposal does not function correctly
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts,

Can anyone tell me if we can use partner assignment to Item Proposal?

In SPRO,  I am able to Assign Partner determination procedure "TA" to Document Type "PV" at header level and procedure "N" to Item category "PVN" at item level.

However after creating Item Proposal (VA51) and then trying to click on Partners Tab in change mode (VA52),  get following error. 

FB call: insufficient parameters

Message no. VP107

Has anyone used partner determination for Item Proposal before?

Thanks,

Girish

entry.title: problem with conversion to S/4HANA 2023 phase XPRAS_AIMMRG
entry.content:
Hello,
we have problem with conversion to S/4HANA 2023 FPS02 in phase MAIN_NEWBAS/XPRAS_AIMMRG. Problem is with BW activation object. Solution is perhaps in note "3316148 - Improve error handling for missing or inactive InfoObject 0REQPLAN during XPRAS_AIMMRG phase", but this note doesn´t exist for version SAP_BW 758. How to proceed?

List from log XPRASUPG.ELG:
A3 ERSO 778 End of after import methode "RS_ODPE_AFTER_IMPORT" ("Režim aktivace") - runtime: "00:00:00"

2EER7501XStart of the after-import method &3"RS_ELEM_AFTER_IMPORT" for object type(s) &1"ELEM" (&2" ")



4 ER9121 Element "6JW7K7L6N103QSISDYUIU693D" copied from 'modified' to 'active'

4 ER9121 Element "6JW7K7L6N103TSI7T77CJKB9Y" copied from 'modified' to 'active'

4 ER9121 Element "6JW7K7L6N103TSI8176HIJLGE" copied from 'modified' to 'active'

4 ER9121 Element "8ZZHFI9OHWPD3Z1AQFDRU7J7G" copied from 'modified' to 'active'

4 ER9121 Element "8ZZHFI9OHWPEU9RGB0KG4ZI6K" copied from 'modified' to 'active'

2EER9118 Error activating element "8ZZHFI9OHWPEU9RGJFEO47XVI"

A2AEBRAIN 299 System error in program "CL_RSRTS_METADATA_ODP/LCL_DTA" and form "POSTPROCESS_PROJECTION"



CAUSE

This internal error is a targeted termination since the program has an

incorrect status.



WHAT_TO_DO

Analyse the situation and inform SAP.


Thank you for quicik help.

entry.title: Using Adobe Services without JAVA
entry.content:
Hello - Below is our current ERP version. We are connecting SAP ERP ABAP system to SAP NetWeaver 7.3 JAVA system to perform ADS activities. 


But we are planning to retire the "NetWeaver 7.3 JAVA system" and wanted to know if there is any other way to use ADS functionality without connecting to JAVA system.


Please provide any direction. We couldn't find any SAP oss notes related to this.


Version:


EHP7 FOR SAP ERP 6.0  
SAP NETWEAVER    7.4


Thank you


PERSON_NAME Nade


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: BAPI or FM to get Process orders details based on input parameters Plant and System status
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
        Is there a BAPI or Function Module available where, if we provide a Plant and System Status (e.g., REL), it will return a list of the required Process Orders?

This would be similar to how COOISPI provides this functionality.

 

I have a requirement to retrieve only the REL Process Orders and verify if the components for those orders are available in the shop floor SLoc. If they are not available, a transfer posting should be made automatically from another SLoc to the shop floor SLoc.

Your expert advice would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance.

Best Regards,

Sandeep

entry.title: Mapping employer-provided bicycle leasing in Germany in SAP ERP 6.08 HCM module
entry.content: Mapping employer-provided bicycle leasing in Germany in SAP ERP 6.08 HCM module. Is there any solution from SAP available?

entry.title: SAP SE16 Tables behind MD04 StockRequirements List
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
we want to recreate the logic of the stock/requirements list (md04). To do this, we need the source data/tables (SE16) behind this process.

Can you please help us here and name the tables and their connections/links to each other to get exactly the same output in the end?

Thank you in advance 🙂

entry.title: Tree structure of material to production orders
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We would like to create a tree structure between materials and production orders using SAP data

Our aim is to create the following structure:

 

DispoLevelMaterial StartMaterial HeaderMaterial ComponentProductionOrder StartProductionOrder HeaderProductionOrder Component
3M0M2M3P0P2P3
2M0M1M2P0P1P2
1M0M0M1P0P0P1
3M0……P0a……

The first part with the materials can also be created using the BOM resolution. The problem we have is the right part, because a material can have many different production orders and here we also try to create this tree structure, which material should be assigned exactly to which order and, above all, how the individual production orders are linked to each other.

The question is: Can this structure be created and if so, how with which tables/data from SAP?

Thanks in advance for the help 🙂

entry.title: Can I set the Screen layout for S_ALR_87011990 in the selection screen?
entry.content:
I'm working on an automation project for month-end closing. We are using a software that runs RFC call to execute standard SAP Tcodes / programs and read out the results from spool for documentation purposes. 

The spool output must be in a specific layout which we maintain by using predefined "screen layouts". This works great for most transactions as they have the field "Layout" in the initial selection screens. One notable exception is "S_ALR_87011990" for which I cannot find the field (thanks SAP for being consistent, ugh :/). As a GUI user running the transaction in the foreground, I just need to select the correct layout once the output is produced. However, this cannot be done by the software we're using as it runs the transaction "in the background". 

We set a specific layout as the "default" layout and it worked for a while, but someone at some point inadvertently set a different variant as default, which "broke" the functionality. 

Does anyone have any ideas how to handle this. Is there a way to select the Layout in the initial selection screen? I've seen a similar question asked here: https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/screen-layout-for-s-alr-87011990/qaq-p/12586939 but there was no conclusive reply.

Alternatively, is there a way to set the default variant for the CPI user the software is using to communicate? 

Maybe there's a totally different way to solve this problem? Can anyone help?

entry.title: Open ASN during MRP run - deleted order
entry.content:
For long time, I am struggling to understand following MRP behavior, which is causing troubles. 

standard process:

OPEN ORDER -> ASN -> GR -> FULLFILLED ORDER

broken process:

OPEN ORDER -> ASN -> ORDER DELETED BY MRP -> GR DONE FOR NEXT EXISTING ORDER (but total order qty lower that really required)

OPEN ORDER -> ASN -> ORDER DELETED BY MRP -> GR NOT POSSIBLE

How is that possible that MRP touches open ASN? 

Below is example. Scheduled quantity is 560, partially goods received is 280 and open quantity is 280.

MRP changes scheduled quantity to 280, but it should create new line with scheduled quantity 280. 

 Here is the result after MRP. 280EAs is missing.


Thanks for any kind of advice.

entry.title: I have 1 client using ECC6 EHP6; he is forced to implement pacs.008 which is replacing MT103;
entry.content:
Hello,

I have 1 client using ECC6 EHP6; he is forced to implement pacs.008 which is replacing MT103 according to the law;Will this be a Z t-code it it can be a standard transaction and how shall we proceed? Thanks in advance for your answer.

Regards

G.Tatayah

entry.title: AL11 pathway source
entry.content:
Apart from debugging, from a posted invoice,is there another way from tables how can we figure out the AL11 pathway for the path of the invoices processed?

Thank you in advance for your comments,

Regards

G.Tatayah

entry.title: Issue with Automatic Cancellation of Purchase Invoice in Intercompany Billing
entry.content:
After canceling a sales invoice using transaction code VF11, the corresponding purchase invoice on the receiving side is not automatically canceled. As a result, the accounting document on the receiving side remains active, and manual cancellation is required.

Is it standard SAP functionality that the purchase invoice is not automatically canceled when a sales invoice is canceled via VF11? If this is not the standard behavior, could you please advise on how to configure the system to automatically reverse the related purchase invoice when the sales invoice is canceled?

entry.title: FMLA implementation in France
entry.content:
Is there any customer who have implemented 

Family and Medical Leave

in france or any other european country ?

These is to know if it's worth investigate the potential of these feature coming into SuccessFactors in H2 2025

entry.title: MIGO y MIRO lento
entry.content:
Buenas tardes,

Estoy con un problema en las transacciones MIGO y MIRO, cada alta (ingreso) que se realiza con ciertos tipos de materiales en las transacciones duran 1 hora a 3 horas en promedio.

Tienen alguna sugerencia para mejorar el tiempo? 

EHP6 FOR SAP ERP 6.0

SYBASE 15.7.0.101

Desde ya gracias
